scripts.deploy: tsc && node dist/manifest-gen.js && node view/build.js && mkdir -p $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-youtube/view && cp dist/index.js dist/sites.js dist/settings.js manifest.json $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-youtube/ && cp view/index.js $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-youtube/view/ && cp -r yt-dlp-plugins $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-youtube/
scripts.package: tsc && node dist/manifest-gen.js && node view/build.js && mkdir -p dist/package/view && cp dist/index.js dist/sites.js dist/settings.js manifest.json dist/package/ && cp view/index.js dist/package/view/ && cp -r yt-dlp-plugins dist/package/ && cd dist/package && zip -r ../plugin-youtube.zip .
